User Guide

Learn how to use the system

Student Management System

Complete User Guide

Welcome to the Student Management System

This comprehensive platform helps you manage your academic journey efficiently. Access your records, track performance, and stay updated with all academic activities.

Easy Access

Quick access to all your academic information in one place

Profile Management

View and manage your personal and academic profile

Attendance Tracking

Monitor your attendance records and stay informed

Marks & Results

View your academic performance and exam results

Dashboard Overview

Your dashboard is the central hub where you can see all important information at a glance.

📊

Quick Stats

View your attendance percentage, current semester, and overall performance metrics instantly.

🔔

Notifications

Stay updated with important announcements, exam schedules, and deadline reminders.

📈

Performance Charts

Visual representation of your academic progress throughout the semester.

Complete Sidebar Menu Guide

The sidebar is your navigation hub. Here's a detailed explanation of each menu option and how to use them effectively.

📊 Dashboard

What it is: Your main control center displaying all important information at a glance.

What you'll see:

  • Quick stats cards showing attendance percentage, current semester, and CGPA
  • Recent notifications and announcements
  • Upcoming events and exam schedules
  • Performance charts and graphs
  • Quick action buttons for common tasks

How to use: Click on any stat card to view detailed information. The dashboard auto-refreshes to show the latest data.

📋 Student Table View

What it is: A comprehensive table displaying all student records in your class or department.

Features available:

  • Search & Filter: Find students by name, USN, branch, or semester
  • Sort Options: Sort by name, USN, attendance, or marks
  • View Details: Click on any student row to see complete profile
  • Export Data: Download student list as Excel or PDF
  • Bulk Actions: Select multiple students for batch operations

How to use: Use the search bar at the top to filter students. Click column headers to sort. Click on a student row to view their complete profile and academic history.

✓ Manage Attendance

What it is: Complete attendance tracking and management system for monitoring student presence.

Key features:

  • Daily Attendance: View today's attendance status for all subjects
  • Subject-wise View: Check attendance percentage for each subject separately
  • Calendar View: See attendance marked on specific dates with color coding (Present: Green, Absent: Red, Leave: Yellow)
  • Attendance Reports: Generate monthly or semester-wise attendance reports
  • Shortage Alerts: Get warnings if attendance falls below 75%
  • Leave Applications: Submit and track leave requests with status updates

How it works: Attendance is automatically synced from the admin system. You can view detailed breakdowns, apply for leave, and download attendance certificates. The system calculates your percentage in real-time.

📝 Students IA (Internal Assessment)

What it is: Your complete internal assessment marks and test results portal.

What you can access:

  • IA Test Marks: View marks for IA1, IA2, and IA3 for all subjects
  • Assignment Scores: Check marks for assignments and projects
  • Quiz Results: See scores from surprise tests and quizzes
  • Subject-wise Analysis: Detailed breakdown of marks in each subject
  • Performance Graphs: Visual charts showing your progress across tests
  • Average Calculation: Automatic calculation of best 2 out of 3 IAs
  • Comparison: Compare your marks with class average (optional)

How it works: Once teachers upload marks, they appear here instantly. You can filter by subject, semester, or test type. Download mark sheets as PDF for your records. The system highlights subjects where you need improvement.

📖 Exam Management

What it is: Complete examination information and results management system.

Available features:

  • Exam Schedule: View complete timetable with date, time, and venue for all exams
  • Hall Tickets: Download your exam hall ticket/admit card
  • Exam Results: Access semester exam results as soon as they're published
  • Subject-wise Marks: Detailed marks breakdown (Internal + External)
  • SGPA/CGPA: View your semester and cumulative grade points
  • Revaluation: Apply for revaluation or photocopy of answer sheets
  • Previous Results: Access all previous semester results in one place
  • Marksheets: Download official digital marksheets

How it works: Exam schedules are published here first. You'll get notifications for new results. Click on any semester to see detailed subject-wise performance. Download and print marksheets directly.

🎓 Generate Marks Card

What it is: Tool to create and download professional marks cards and grade reports.

What you can do:

  • Custom Reports: Generate marks cards for specific semesters or all semesters
  • Format Options: Choose between detailed or summary format
  • Include Options: Select what to include (IA marks, exam marks, attendance, etc.)
  • Official Seal: Generated cards include college logo and digital signature
  • Download Formats: Save as PDF or print directly
  • Consolidated Report: Create a complete academic transcript with all semesters

How to use: Select the semester(s) you want, choose the format, and click generate. The system creates a professional marks card that you can download or email to yourself. Perfect for scholarship applications or job interviews.

💳 Fee Management

What it is: Complete fee payment tracking and receipt management system.

Features included:

  • Fee Structure: View complete breakdown of tuition and other fees
  • Payment History: See all your previous fee payments with dates and amounts
  • Pending Dues: Check any outstanding fees or pending payments
  • Online Payment: Pay fees directly through integrated payment gateway
  • Receipt Download: Download official fee receipts for any payment
  • Installment Tracking: Monitor installment due dates and amounts
  • Scholarship Info: View applied scholarships and their status
  • Payment Reminders: Get notifications before due dates

How it works: All fee-related information is displayed here. You can make payments online, download receipts instantly, and track your payment history. The system sends reminders for upcoming due dates.

Step-by-Step Tutorials

Learn how to perform common tasks with these detailed step-by-step guides.

Tutorial 1

How to Check Your Attendance

1

Open Manage Attendance

Click on "Manage Attendance" from the sidebar menu. This will open the attendance dashboard.

2

View Overall Percentage

At the top, you'll see your overall attendance percentage displayed prominently. This is calculated across all subjects.

3

Check Subject-wise Attendance

Scroll down to see individual subject cards. Each card shows the subject name, total classes, classes attended, and percentage.

4

View Detailed Calendar

Click on any subject card to see a calendar view with color-coded attendance (Green = Present, Red = Absent, Yellow = Leave).

5

Download Report

Click the "Download Report" button to get a PDF of your attendance record for official purposes.

Tutorial 2

How to View Your IA Marks

1

Navigate to Students IA

Click "Students IA" from the sidebar. This opens your internal assessment portal.

2

Select Semester

Use the dropdown at the top to select which semester's marks you want to view.

3

Choose IA Test

Select IA1, IA2, or IA3 from the tabs. You can also view "All Tests" to see everything together.

4

View Subject Marks

A table will display all subjects with marks obtained, maximum marks, and percentage for each subject.

5

Check Performance Graph

Scroll down to see visual charts comparing your performance across different subjects and tests.

6

Download Mark Sheet

Click "Download PDF" to save your IA marks as an official document.

Tutorial 3

How to Generate Your Marks Card

1

Open Generate Marks Card

Click "Generate Marks Card" from the sidebar menu.

2

Select Semesters

Choose which semester(s) you want to include. You can select one semester or all semesters for a consolidated report.

3

Choose Format

Select between "Detailed" (includes all marks breakdown) or "Summary" (shows only final grades).

4

Select Additional Options

Check boxes to include: IA marks, attendance percentage, SGPA/CGPA, or remarks.

5

Preview and Generate

Click "Preview" to see how it looks, then click "Generate PDF" to create your official marks card with college seal.

Tutorial 4

How to Pay Fees Online

1

Go to Fee Management

Click "Fee Management" from the sidebar to open the fee portal.

2

View Pending Dues

Check the "Pending Payments" section to see what fees are due and their deadlines.

3

Select Payment

Click on the fee item you want to pay. A detailed breakdown will appear showing all components.

4

Choose Payment Method

Select your preferred payment method: Credit/Debit Card, Net Banking, UPI, or Wallet.

5

Complete Payment

Click "Pay Now" and complete the payment through the secure payment gateway.

6

Download Receipt

After successful payment, your receipt will be generated automatically. Download and save it for your records.

Tutorial 5

How to Apply for Leave

1

Access Attendance Section

Go to "Manage Attendance" from the sidebar menu.

2

Click Apply Leave

Find and click the "Apply for Leave" button, usually at the top right of the page.

3

Fill Leave Details

Enter: Leave type (Medical/Personal), Start date, End date, and Reason for leave.

4

Attach Documents

If applying for medical leave, attach a doctor's certificate or medical report (optional but recommended).

5

Submit Application

Review all details and click "Submit Leave Application". You'll receive a confirmation message.

6

Track Status

Check the "Leave Applications" tab to see the status: Pending, Approved, or Rejected with comments.

Key Features

Explore the powerful features that make your academic management easier.

01

Real-time Updates

Get instant notifications about marks, attendance, and important announcements. The system automatically syncs with the database to ensure you always have the latest information.

02

Detailed Analytics

View comprehensive charts and graphs showing your academic progress. Track trends in your performance across different subjects and semesters.

03

Document Access

Download important documents like mark sheets, attendance reports, and certificates directly from the system.

04

Secure & Private

Your data is protected with industry-standard security measures. Only you can access your personal academic information.

Frequently Asked Questions & Help

Find answers to common questions and troubleshooting tips.

🔐 Account & Login

Q:

What is my login username?

A:

Your username is your University Seat Number (USN). For example: 1JS21CS001. Make sure to enter it in uppercase.

Q:

I forgot my password. What should I do?

A:

Click on "Forgot Password" on the login page. Enter your USN and registered email. You'll receive a password reset link within 5 minutes. If you don't receive it, contact the admin office.

Q:

Can I change my password?

A:

Yes! Go to Settings ? Change Password. Enter your current password, then your new password twice. Use a strong password with at least 8 characters including letters, numbers, and symbols.

Q:

Why can't I log in?

A:

Common reasons: (1) USN entered in lowercase - use UPPERCASE, (2) Wrong password - try resetting it, (3) Account not activated - contact admin, (4) Browser cache issue - clear cache and try again.

✓ Attendance

Q:

My attendance is showing incorrectly. What should I do?

A:

First, check the date and subject carefully. If there's still an error, take a screenshot and report it to your class teacher or HOD within 48 hours. Attendance corrections are processed weekly.

Q:

How is attendance percentage calculated?

A:

Formula: (Classes Attended ? Total Classes Conducted) ? 100. For example: If 80 classes were conducted and you attended 72, your percentage is (72?80)?100 = 90%.

Q:

What happens if my attendance falls below 75%?

A:

You'll receive a warning notification. Below 75% may result in: (1) Not eligible for exams, (2) Parent notification, (3) Required to submit condonation application with valid reasons and documents.

Q:

How long does leave approval take?

A:

Typically 1-2 working days. Medical leave with certificate is usually approved faster. Emergency leave should be applied immediately with proper documentation. Check status in the Leave Applications tab.

📊 Marks & Results

Q:

When will my IA marks be published?

A:

IA marks are typically published within 7-10 days after the test. You'll receive a notification once marks are uploaded. Teachers may take longer for descriptive subjects requiring detailed evaluation.

Q:

I think there's an error in my marks. How do I report it?

A:

Go to Students IA ? Select the subject ? Click "Report Issue" button. Provide details: Test name, marks shown vs expected, and reason. The subject teacher will review and respond within 3 working days.

Q:

How is my final IA marks calculated?

A:

The system automatically takes the best 2 out of 3 IA tests. For example: If you scored 15, 18, and 12 in IA1, IA2, and IA3, your final IA marks will be the average of 18 and 15 = 16.5 marks.

Q:

Can I download my marks card?

A:

Yes! Go to "Generate Marks Card" from the sidebar. Select semester(s), choose format, and click Generate PDF. The downloaded marks card includes college seal and is valid for official purposes.

Q:

What is SGPA and CGPA?

A:

SGPA (Semester Grade Point Average) = Your grade points for one semester. CGPA (Cumulative Grade Point Average) = Average of all semesters combined. Both are on a 10-point scale.

💰 Fee Payment

Q:

Is online payment safe?

A:

Yes, completely safe! We use industry-standard encrypted payment gateways (SSL certified). Your card details are never stored on our servers. All transactions are secure and PCI-DSS compliant.

Q:

Payment failed but money was deducted. What should I do?

A:

Don't panic! This is usually a temporary hold. The amount will be automatically refunded within 5-7 working days. Save the transaction ID and contact the accounts department immediately with: (1) Transaction ID, (2) Amount, (3) Date & Time, (4) Bank statement screenshot.

Q:

Can I pay fees in installments?

A:

Yes, if your fee structure allows installments. Go to Fee Management to see your installment schedule with due dates. Make sure to pay each installment before the deadline to avoid late fees.

Q:

I lost my fee receipt. Can I download it again?

A:

Yes! Go to Fee Management ? Payment History ? Click on the payment ? Download Receipt. You can download your receipt anytime, as many times as needed. All receipts are stored permanently.

⚙️ Technical Issues

Q:

The website is loading slowly. What should I do?

A:

Try these steps: (1) Check your internet connection, (2) Clear browser cache (Ctrl+Shift+Delete), (3) Try a different browser (Chrome, Firefox, Edge), (4) Disable browser extensions temporarily, (5) Try incognito/private mode.

Q:

PDF download is not working. Help!

A:

Solutions: (1) Check if pop-ups are blocked - allow pop-ups for this site, (2) Ensure you have a PDF reader installed, (3) Try right-click ? Save As, (4) Try a different browser, (5) Check if your download folder has space.

Q:

Which browsers are supported?

A:

Recommended browsers: Google Chrome (latest), Mozilla Firefox (latest), Microsoft Edge (latest), Safari (latest). For best experience, keep your browser updated. Internet Explorer is NOT supported.

Q:

Can I use this on my mobile phone?

A:

Yes! The system is fully mobile-responsive. Works on all smartphones and tablets. Use your mobile browser (Chrome, Safari, Firefox). For best experience, use landscape mode for tables and reports.

Q:

Who do I contact for technical support?

A:

Contact IT Support:
📧 Email: support@college.edu
☎️ Phone: +91-XXXX-XXXXXX (Mon-Fri, 9 AM - 5 PM)
💬 Live Chat: Click the chat icon at bottom right
Include: Your USN, issue description, screenshots, and browser details.

Tips & Tricks

Make the most of your Student Management System with these helpful tips.

✓

Regular Check-ins

Login regularly to stay updated with the latest marks and attendance records.

🔔

Enable Notifications

Turn on browser notifications to receive instant alerts about important updates.

📱

Mobile Friendly

Access the system from any device - desktop, tablet, or smartphone.

🔐

Keep Password Safe

Never share your login credentials. Change your password regularly for security.

📊

Track Progress

Use the analytics dashboard to identify areas where you need to improve.

ⓘ

Need Help?

Contact your administrator if you encounter any issues or have questions.
